hero_subtitle: Ŋmɛi afi yeli shitsumo a AI nɔ

upload_subtitle: ojogbaŋŋ click lɛ hwɛ / fa kamera

select_subtitle: Tɛɛ kaad ni sɛ yi, na confirm
result_treatment_sub: Di akwan yi gba na ayare wo ŋmɛi
result_prevention_sub: Di akwan yi na kɛ ŋmɛi pɔ mli
result_healthy_msg: Nyɛ gbɛ ko! Wo ŋmɛi ni pɔ mli.
result_healthy_sub: Di tips yi na kɛ e ni sɛɛ.
result_at_risk_msg: Wo ŋmɛi aŋ nyɛ ayare kɛ ehi adanse suɔmɔ.
result_at_risk_sub: Yɛ sɛsɛ na kɛ ayare kɛ ashwe.
result_infected_sub: Di ayaresa nuu a lɛ fɛɛ ntɛm.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_scan_failed: Scan a ɛnni ade. Sɔ bio.
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Fa jpg, png, kɛ webp foto.
error_no_results: Wonhu ŋmɛi biara. Sɔ foto a ɛhyerɛn bio.
history_empty: Scan bi ko. Scan wo ŋmɛi suɔ!
history_empty_sub: Wo adwene bɛ ni yɛ bɛ ba ha.
history_clear_confirm: O ni kɛ sɔ scan bɛ lɛ?
settings_built_with: Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI nɛ efee
lab_precision_body: Yɛ nɔ ni yeli 500,000+ ŋmɛi yeli shika.
expert_insights_body: Nya ayaresa kɛ nhwɛso a organic.
camera_error_denied: Kamera yeli ko. Ma yeli na sɔ bio.
rightpanel_home_title: Hu amɔbɔ a ɛwɔ aduaduanamɔ ho
rightpanel_home_desc: Fa photo biara a ɛwɔ aduaduanamɔ ho no si so na nya AI diagnosis a ɛyɛ papa wɔ sɛkɔnd 8 mu.
rightpanel_feature_langs_body: Adwene wɔ Zulu, Xhosa, Swahili ne bebree ho
rightpanel_result_desc: Hwɛ wo ŋmɛi pɔ mli na di akwan a lɛ wɔ ase yi.
rightpanel_tip_1: Fa foto wɔ sunsum hann mu ma ɛyɛ yiye
rightpanel_tip_2: Si akoma amɔbɔ a ɛwɔ haw anaa mmati so
rightpanel_tip_3: Scan dɔnnwɛ biara sɛ ŋmɛi no regyina
rightpanel_tip_4: Kyekyere adwene no kyerɛ wo aduaduanamɔ ho ɔpɛnimfo
rightpanel_history_desc: Wo scan 20 a etwa no sie wɔ sɛnea ɛteɛ. Bɔ biara ho na hwɛ adwene no nyinaa.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Scan biara sie wɔ wo device
rightpanel_history_limit_body: A etwa no yi wɔ otomatik
rightpanel_settings_desc: Hi wo kasa ni preferences. Wɔbɛ sie settings la wɔ wo device dzi.
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: UI kɛ AI adwene a wɔkyerɛwe
